SELECT
  BM.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT ,
  BM.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
  BM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
  BM.PRODUCT_KEY,
  BM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
  BM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  BM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  BM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  BM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE,
  BM.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
  BM.PRODUCT_TYPE DV_PRODUCT_TYPE,
  'SERVICE_COST' PNL_BOOK_NET_COST_TYPE,
   CASE 
  WHEN BM.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID IN ('ADVANCED SERVICES')
   THEN  
  CASE WHEN BM.ACCOUNT_NAME IN ('AS SUBSCRIPTION')
   THEN 
   CASE
       WHEN BM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('ERP','XAAS')
           THEN
               CASE 
                   WHEN UPPER(BM.CANCEL_CODE) IN ('LOST ORDER')
                       THEN
                       CASE WHEN BM.DV_CISCO_BOOKED_DT < FY.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE THEN 'AS-S Prior Period DeBookings Cost'
                       ELSE 'AS-S Current DeBookings Cost'
                       END
                   ELSE 'AS-S Current Bookings Cost' 
               END
       WHEN BM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('AR')
           THEN
               CASE 
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('CM','CM_REVENUE') AND TRIM(UPPER(BM.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE)) <> 'RETURN' THEN 'AS-S Bookings Credit Memos Cost'
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('CM','CM_REVENUE') AND TRIM(UPPER(BM.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE)) = 'RETURN' THEN 'AS-S Bookings RMA Cost'
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('REVENUE TRANSFER AUTO - MANUAL') THEN 'AS-S Bookings Revenue Transfer Auto - Manual Cost'
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('REVENUE TRANSFER AUTO - SYSTEM') THEN 'AS-S Bookings Revenue Transfer Auto - System Cost'
                   ELSE 'AS-S Bookings Not Mapped AR Cost'
               END
       WHEN BM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('SLS_ADJ')
           THEN
               CASE
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('RMKT1','RMKT') THEN 'AS-S Bookings Refurbished Orders Cost'
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('MITG-RES','RR-RES') THEN 'AS-S Bookings Reserve Cost'
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('MITG-REL','RR-REL') THEN 'AS-S Bookings Release Cost'
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('MGMT-RF','MGMT-W','MGMT-BC','MGMT-AE','MGMT-M','NBM-M','TCCV-A','TCCV-T') THEN 'AS-S Bookings Management Adjustment Cost'
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('RB','VIP','RB1','VOLREB') THEN 'AS-S Bookings Rebate Adjustment Cost'
                   WHEN (TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) LIKE 'AC-%' OR  TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('MS-EMS','MS-NS','MS-PPS'))THEN 'AS-S Bookings Acquisition Adjustment Cost'
                   WHEN ((TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) LIKE 'CLD-%') OR (TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) LIKE 'LL-%') OR (TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ( 'LCLD-PVT'))) THEN 'AS-S Bookings Cloud Adjustment Cost'
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) LIKE ('FMV-%')  THEN 'AS-S Bookings FMV Adjustment Cost'
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) LIKE ('SBP-%')  THEN 'AS-S Bookings SBP Adjustment Cost'
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) LIKE ('MS-SMS%')  THEN 'AS-S Bookings Managed Services Adjustment Cost'
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) LIKE ('SS-%')  THEN 'AS-S Bookings Solution Selling Adjustment Cost'
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) LIKE ('XAAS-%')  THEN 'AS-S Bookings XaaS Adjustment Cost'
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('1C_BOOK','1C_REV','BKG-CR','EMN','MULTINAT') THEN 'AS-S Bookings Other Adjustment Cost'
                   ELSE 'AS-S Bookings Not Mapped Adjustment Cost'
               END
       WHEN BM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('POS') 
       THEN 'AS-S Bookings Net POS Cost'
       WHEN BM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('POS_ADJ') THEN 'AS-S Bookings POS Adjustments Cost'
       ELSE 'AS-S Not Mapped Bookings Cost'    
   END 
   
  WHEN BM.ACCOUNT_NAME IN  ('AS TRANSACTION','AS ADVISORY','AS FIXED')
   THEN 
   CASE
       WHEN BM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('ERP','XAAS')
           THEN
               CASE 
                   WHEN UPPER(BM.CANCEL_CODE) IN ('LOST ORDER')
                       THEN
                       CASE WHEN BM.DV_CISCO_BOOKED_DT < FY.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE THEN 'AS-T Prior Period DeBookings Cost'
                       ELSE 'AS-T Current DeBookings Cost'
                       END
                   ELSE 'AS-T Current Bookings Cost' 
               END
       WHEN BM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('AR')
           THEN
               CASE 
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('CM','CM_REVENUE') AND TRIM(UPPER(BM.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE)) <> 'RETURN' THEN 'AS-T Bookings Credit Memos Cost'
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('CM','CM_REVENUE') AND TRIM(UPPER(BM.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE)) = 'RETURN' THEN 'AS-T Bookings RMA Cost'
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('REVENUE TRANSFER AUTO - MANUAL') THEN 'AS-T Bookings Revenue Transfer Auto - Manual Cost'
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('REVENUE TRANSFER AUTO - SYSTEM') THEN 'AS-T Bookings Revenue Transfer Auto - System Cost'
                   ELSE 'AS-T Bookings Not Mapped AR Cost'
               END
       WHEN BM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('SLS_ADJ')
           THEN
               CASE
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('RMKT1','RMKT') THEN 'AS-T Bookings Refurbished Orders Cost'
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('MITG-RES','RR-RES') THEN 'AS-T Bookings Reserve Cost'
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('MITG-REL','RR-REL') THEN 'AS-T Bookings Release Cost'
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('MGMT-RF','MGMT-W','MGMT-BC','MGMT-AE','MGMT-M','NBM-M','TCCV-A','TCCV-T') THEN 'AS-T Bookings Management Adjustment Cost'
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('RB','VIP','RB1','VOLREB') THEN 'AS-T Bookings Rebate Adjustment Cost'
                   WHEN (TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) LIKE 'AC-%' OR  TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('MS-EMS','MS-NS','MS-PPS'))THEN 'AS-T Bookings Acquisition Adjustment Cost'
                   WHEN ((TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) LIKE 'CLD-%') OR (TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) LIKE 'LL-%') OR (TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ( 'LCLD-PVT'))) THEN 'AS-T Bookings Cloud Adjustment Cost'
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) LIKE ('FMV-%')  THEN 'AS-T Bookings FMV Adjustment Cost'
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) LIKE ('SBP-%')  THEN 'AS-T Bookings SBP Adjustment Cost'
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) LIKE ('MS-SMS%')  THEN 'AS-T Bookings Managed Services Adjustment Cost'
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) LIKE ('SS-%')  THEN 'AS-T Bookings Solution Selling Adjustment Cost'
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) LIKE ('XAAS-%')  THEN 'AS-T Bookings XaaS Adjustment Cost'
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('1C_BOOK','1C_REV','BKG-CR','EMN','MULTINAT') THEN 'AS-T Bookings Other Adjustment Cost'
                   ELSE 'AS-T Bookings Not Mapped Adjustment Cost'
               END
       WHEN BM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('POS') 
       THEN 'AS-T Bookings Net POS Cost'
       WHEN BM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('POS_ADJ') THEN 'AS-T Bookings POS Adjustments Cost'
       ELSE 'AS-T Not Mapped Bookings Cost'    
   END 
     ELSE 'AS Not Mapped Bookings Cost'
    END
   
   WHEN BM.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID IN ('TECHNICAL SUPPORT SERVICES','REMOTE OPERATIONS SERVICES')
   THEN 
   CASE
       WHEN BM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('ERP','XAAS')
           THEN
               CASE 
                   WHEN UPPER(BM.CANCEL_CODE) IN ('LOST ORDER')
                       THEN
                       CASE WHEN BM.DV_CISCO_BOOKED_DT < FY.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE THEN 'TSS Prior Period DeBookings Cost'
                       ELSE 'TSS Current DeBookings Cost'

       WHEN BM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('AR')
           THEN
               CASE

                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('CM','CM_REVENUE') AND TRIM(UPPER(BM.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE)) = 'RETURN' THEN 'TSS Bookings RMA Cost'
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('REVENUE TRANSFER AUTO - MANUAL') THEN 'TSS Bookings Revenue Transfer Auto - Manual Cost'
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('REVENUE TRANSFER AUTO - SYSTEM') THEN 'TSS Bookings Revenue Transfer Auto - System Cost'
                   ELSE 'TSS Bookings Not Mapped AR Cost'
               END
       WHEN BM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('SLS_ADJ')
           THEN
               CASE
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('RMKT1','RMKT') THEN 'TSS Bookings Refurbished Orders Cost'
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('MITG-RES','RR-RES') THEN 'TSS Bookings Reserve Cost'
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('MITG-REL','RR-REL') THEN 'TSS Bookings Release Cost'
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('MGMT-RF','MGMT-W','MGMT-BC','MGMT-AE','MGMT-M','NBM-M','TCCV-A','TCCV-T') THEN 'TSS Bookings Management Adjustment Cost'
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('RB','VIP','RB1','VOLREB') THEN 'TSS Bookings Rebate Adjustment Cost'
                   WHEN (TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) LIKE 'AC-%' OR  TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('MS-EMS','MS-NS','MS-PPS'))THEN 'TSS Bookings Acquisition Adjustment Cost'
                   WHEN ((TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) LIKE 'CLD-%') OR (TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) LIKE 'LL-%') OR (TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ( 'LCLD-PVT'))) THEN 'TSS Bookings Cloud Adjustment Cost'
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) LIKE ('FMV-%')  THEN 'TSS Bookings FMV Adjustment Cost'
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) LIKE ('SBP-%')  THEN 'TSS Bookings SBP Adjustment Cost'
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) LIKE ('MS-SMS%')  THEN 'TSS Bookings Managed Services Adjustment Cost'
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) LIKE ('SS-%')  THEN 'TSS Bookings Solution Selling Adjustment Cost'
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) LIKE ('XAAS-%')  THEN 'TSS Bookings XaaS Adjustment Cost'
                   WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('1C_BOOK','1C_REV','BKG-CR','EMN','MULTINAT') THEN 'TSS Bookings Other Adjustment Cost'
                   ELSE 'TSS Bookings Not Mapped Adjustment Cost'
               END
       WHEN BM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('POS') 
       THEN 'TSS Bookings Net POS Cost'
       WHEN BM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('POS_ADJ') THEN 'TSS Bookings POS Adjustments Cost'
       ELSE 'TSS Not Mapped Bookings Cost'    
   END 
   
  ELSE 'Service Bookings Cost Not Mapped' 
  END AS DV_BOOKINGS_LINE_ITEM_NAME,
  sum(BM.BOOKINGS_STD_COST) BOOKINGS_AMOUNT,
  'COGS' DV_BOOKINGS_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD,
 BM.DEAL_SS_CD,
  BM.DV_DEAL_ID,
  BM.XCAT_FLG,
  BM.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
  BM.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,
  BM.ELA_FLG,
 NULL,
 NULL,
 'N',
  BM.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,
  BM.DV_TSS_ALCTN_MTHD_TYPE_ID_INT,
  BM.BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID,
  BM.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,
  BM.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD
   ,BM.BK_AS_ATO_ARCHITECTURE_NAME
 ,BM.BK_BUSI_SVC_OFFER_TYPE_NAME
 ,BM.BK_AS_ATO_TECH_NAME
,BM.DV_GSP_OR_CX_PRODUCT /*ADDING AS PART OF JUNE 6 2019 RELEASE */
  FROM
  $$STGDB.WI_BKGS_HIER_SRVCE_COST_AS BM

              END 
              
  WHEN BM.ACCOUNT_NAME IN  ('AS TRANSACTION','AS ADVISORY','AS FIXED')
              THEN 
              CASE
                  WHEN BM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('ERP','XAAS')
                      THEN
                          CASE 
                              WHEN UPPER(BM.CANCEL_CODE) IN ('LOST ORDER')
                                  THEN
                                  CASE WHEN BM.DV_CISCO_BOOKED_DT < FY.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE THEN 'AS-T Annuity Prior period DeBookings'
                                  ELSE 'AS-T Annuity Current DeBookings'
                                  END
                              ELSE 'AS-T Annuity Base Current Bookings' 
                          END
                  WHEN BM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('AR')
                      THEN
                          CASE 
                              WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('CM','CM_REVENUE') AND TRIM(UPPER(BM.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE)) <> 'RETURN' THEN 'AS-T Annuity Bookings Credit Memos'
                              WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('CM','CM_REVENUE') AND TRIM(UPPER(BM.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE)) = 'RETURN' THEN 'AS-T Annuity Bookings RMA'
                              WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('REVENUE TRANSFER AUTO - MANUAL') THEN 'AS-T Annuity Bookings Revenue Transfer Auto - Manual'
                              WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('REVENUE TRANSFER AUTO - SYSTEM') THEN 'AS-T Annuity Bookings Revenue Transfer Auto - System'
                              ELSE 'AS-T Annuity Bookings Not Mapped AR'
                          END
                  WHEN BM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('SLS_ADJ')
                      THEN
                          CASE
                              WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('RMKT1','RMKT') THEN 'AS-T Annuity Bookings Refurbished Orders'
                              WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('MITG-RES','RR-RES') THEN 'AS-T Annuity Bookings Reserve'
                              WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('MITG-REL','RR-REL') THEN 'AS-T Annuity Bookings Release'
                              WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('MGMT-RF','MGMT-W','MGMT-BC','MGMT-AE','MGMT-M','NBM-M','TCCV-A','TCCV-T') THEN 'AS-T Annuity Bookings Management Adjustment'
                              WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('RB','VIP','RB1','VOLREB') THEN 'AS-T Annuity Bookings Rebate Adjustment'
                              WHEN (TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) LIKE 'AC-%' OR  TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('MS-EMS','MS-NS','MS-PPS'))THEN 'AS-T Annuity Bookings Acquisition Adjustment'
                              WHEN ((TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) LIKE 'CLD-%') OR (TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) LIKE 'LL-%') OR (TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ( 'LCLD-PVT'))) THEN 'AS-T Annuity Bookings Cloud Adjustment'
                              WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) LIKE ('FMV-%')  THEN 'AS-T Annuity Bookings FMV Adjustment'
                              WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) LIKE ('SBP-%')  THEN 'AS-T Annuity Bookings SBP Adjustment'
                              WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) LIKE ('MS-SMS%')  THEN 'AS-T Annuity Bookings Managed Services Adjustment'
                              WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) LIKE ('SS-%')  THEN 'AS-T Annuity Bookings Solution Selling Adjustment'
                              WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) LIKE ('XAAS-%')  THEN 'AS-T Annuity Bookings Xaas Adjustment'
                              WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('1C_BOOK','1C_REV','BKG-CR','EMN','MULTINAT') THEN 'AS-T Annuity Bookings Other Adjustment'
                              ELSE 'AS-T Annuity Bookings Not Mapped Adjustment'
                          END
                  WHEN BM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('POS') 
                  THEN 'AS-T Annuity Base Bookings Net POS'
                  WHEN BM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('POS_ADJ') THEN 'AS-T Annuity Base Bookings POS Adjustments'
                  ELSE 'AS-T Annuity Base Not Mapped Bookings Net'    
              END 
    ELSE 'AS Not Mapped Annuity Bookings'
    END
 
 WHEN BM.BK_SERVICE_CATEGORY_ID IN ('TECHNICAL SUPPORT SERVICES','REMOTE OPERATIONS SERVICES')
 /*WHEN BM.ACCOUNT_NAME IN ('TECHNICAL SUPPORT SERVICES','REMOTE OPERATIONS SERVICES')*/
              THEN

                      THEN

                                  END

                          END
                  WHEN BM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('AR')
                      THEN

                              WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('CM','CM_REVENUE') AND TRIM(UPPER(BM.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE)) = 'RETURN' THEN 'TSS Annuity Bookings RMA'
                              WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('REVENUE TRANSFER AUTO - MANUAL') THEN 'TSS Annuity Bookings Revenue Transfer Auto - Manual'
                              WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('REVENUE TRANSFER AUTO - SYSTEM') THEN 'TSS Annuity Bookings Revenue Transfer Auto - System'
                              ELSE 'TSS Annuity Bookings Not Mapped AR'
                          END
                  WHEN BM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('SLS_ADJ')
                      THEN
                          CASE
                              WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('RMKT1','RMKT') THEN 'TSS Annuity Bookings Refurbished Orders'
                              WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('MITG-RES','RR-RES') THEN 'TSS Annuity Bookings Reserve'
                              WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('MITG-REL','RR-REL') THEN 'TSS Annuity Bookings Release'
                              WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('MGMT-RF','MGMT-W','MGMT-BC','MGMT-AE','MGMT-M','NBM-M','TCCV-A','TCCV-T') THEN 'TSS Annuity Bookings Management Adjustment'
                              WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('RB','VIP','RB1','VOLREB') THEN 'TSS Annuity Bookings Rebate Adjustment'
                              WHEN (TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) LIKE 'AC-%' OR  TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('MS-EMS','MS-NS','MS-PPS'))THEN 'TSS Annuity Bookings Acquisition Adjustment'
                              WHEN ((TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) LIKE 'CLD-%') OR (TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) LIKE 'LL-%') OR (TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ( 'LCLD-PVT'))) THEN 'TSS Annuity Bookings Cloud Adjustment'
                              WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) LIKE ('FMV-%')  THEN 'TSS Annuity Bookings FMV Adjustment'
                              WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) LIKE ('SBP-%')  THEN 'TSS Annuity Bookings SBP Adjustment'
                              WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) LIKE ('MS-SMS%')  THEN 'TSS Annuity Bookings Managed Services Adjustment'
                              WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) LIKE ('SS-%')  THEN 'TSS Annuity Bookings Solution Selling Adjustment'
                              WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) LIKE ('XAAS-%')  THEN 'TSS Annuity Bookings Xaas Adjustment'
                              WHEN TRIM(UPPER(BM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE)) IN ('1C_BOOK','1C_REV','BKG-CR','EMN','MULTINAT') THEN 'TSS Annuity Bookings Other Adjustment'
                              ELSE 'TSS Annuity Bookings Not Mapped Adjustment'
                          END
                  WHEN BM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('POS') 
                  THEN 'TSS Annuity Base Bookings Net POS'
                  WHEN BM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('POS_ADJ') THEN 'TSS Annuity Base Bookings POS Adjustments'
                  ELSE 'TSS Annuity Base Not Mapped Bookings Net'    
              END 
              
  ELSE 'Service Not Mapped Annuity Bookings Net'
